title: Longest Subarray Zero Sum
hints: Use prefix sum technique with a hash map.
If prefix sum at index i equals prefix sum at index j (i < j), then subarray from i+1 to j sums to zero.
Store the first occurrence of each prefix sum in a hash map.
If prefix sum is 0, the subarray from start to current index sums to zero.
If a prefix sum repeats, calculate the length of the subarray between the two occurrences.
Keep track of the maximum length found.
Time complexity is O(n) and space complexity is O(n).
